sentences.text: Hans felt happy because all his flowers were growing well.
He was glad that the hard winter was over and he could enjoy the spring.
The Miller said, 'We often talked about you during the winter, Hans, and wondered how you were doing.'
Hans replied, 'That was kind of you, but I was a bit worried you had forgotten me.'
